title: Attention Is All You Need
problem: The paper proposes a new sequence transduction architecture based entirely on attention mechanisms.
abstract: We propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism...
introduction: Recurrent models have been dominant for sequence transduction tasks...
methodology_text: The Transformer follows an encoder-decoder architecture using stacked self-attention and feed-forward layers...
model_description: Multi-head attention, positional encodings, residual connections, and layer normalization are the primary building blocks.
